case_title: PATEL, RAMESH vs. THOMAS, BRIAN et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT THOMAS, BRIAN THOMAS, FRANCINE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAMESH SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON APR-25-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMAS, BRIAN THOMAS, FRANCINE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 118 TAYLOR STREET #204, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $826.56 RENT, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $906.56, STAYED UNTIL MAY-02-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, BACK RENTS/DAMAGES & COSTS WAIVED IF DFTS COMPLY WITH STIPULATION. BACK RENT AMOUNT INCLUDES DAMAGES OF $13.33 PER DAY FROM 4-1-95 THRU 5-2-95. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS AS LONG AS TERMS COMPLIED WITH. EACH SIDE WAIVES ALL CLAIMS. NO FURTHER STAYS.

DEPT 07. JUDGE TOMAR MASON. REPORTER: M.NORMAN. CLERK: G. SHULL. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. CASE SETTLED. JUDGMENT PERSUANT TO STIPULATION FILED BY PLTFF. CASE NOT SETTLED ON RECORD.
